tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits for this patient’s age and sex. No evidence of renal dysfunction, electrolyte imbalance, or dysglycemia. Lipid profile is within recommended ranges. Urinary microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, indicating no significant renal microvascular damage. Overall, laboratory findings are unremarkable and do not indicate acute or chronic pathology at this time.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
